title: Secret Life
body:
Secret Life is the fifth instalment of the life series, putting everyone in a deathmatch with 3 lives.

The catch? You have 3 rows of hearts that do not regenerate and disappear upon losing them.

Every session, you will get Tasks. These are optional missions that you can do for extra loot and hearts.

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 

To start, do;
/function secretlife:start

To roll secrets, do;
/function secretlife:task

To gift a heart, do;
/trigger gift

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 


Free use. Just give credit if used in a recorded series ^^

Join the discord for Support and/or Task suggestions :D

https://discord.gg/5EJUGCPU
